aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: Maybe — the stars are neutral, which means your tests are probably also neutral, which means nothing.
aries.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet today. Your Slack notifications are not. They never are.

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: Yes — low cosmic activity means low blast radius. Probably.
taurus.prophecy: The universe offers stillness. You will use it to finally clean up that 800-line component. You will not finish.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: Maybe — quiet stars suggest quiet deploys. Your staging environment has other plans.
gemini.prophecy: The cosmos whisper of calm waters ahead. You will open 14 tabs researching a problem you don't have yet.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: No — the cosmos said rest. Listen to the cosmos for once.
cancer.prophecy: A quiet day awaits. You will spend it reading docs you bookmarked six months ago and still won't finish.

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: Maybe — the stars are indifferent. Your rollback plan is not ready. Reconsider.
leo.prophecy: The universe suggests a low-key day. Leo does not do low-key. The standup will be forty minutes long.

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: Yes — planetary silence is optimal deployment weather. Run your checklist anyway. All 47 items.
virgo.prophecy: Calm skies align with your meticulous nature. You will refactor something that wasn't broken. It will break.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — you've been debating this deploy for three days. The cosmos are also undecided. Classic.
libra.prophecy: Balance is available to you today. You will spend it deciding between two identical variable names.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — it's too quiet. Scorpio knows what quiet means. Something is about to page you.
scorpio.prophecy: The silence of the cosmos is not peace. It's a production incident that hasn't sent an alert yet.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — Sagittarius deploys on vibes and asks for forgiveness later. The cosmos said quiet. You said YOLO.
sagittarius.prophecy: A gentle day was promised. You will treat it as an invitation to rewrite the entire authentication system from scratch.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: Yes — Capricorn doesn't need the stars' permission. The Jira ticket is approved. That's enough.
capricorn.prophecy: The cosmos suggest rest. Your Q3 roadmap does not. The roadmap wins. It always wins.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: No — you'll spend today rearchitecting things that didn't need it. Save the deploy for when you're done.
aquarius.prophecy: The universe is calm. You will propose a microservices migration in the design review. Just because.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: No — you're already half asleep. The diff can wait until tomorrow.
pisces.prophecy: The cosmos offer a soft, dreamy day. Your on-call rotation starts at midnight. Sweet dreams.
